_description: Risk tiers for The Shopkeeper. Read by agents and scope-check.sh before every merge.

high.description: Core cognitive architecture. One wrong line breaks the living loop.

medium.description: Server, API, workers, config. Breakage is recoverable but costly.

low.description: Frontend, tests, docs, scripts, migrations. Safe to iterate fast.

overrides._description: Per-task clearance overrides. scope-check.sh reads these.

example.reason: Frontend-only task. Must not touch any Python backend files.

escalation_rules.risk_policy_changed: If risk-policy.json itself is modified, require manual review regardless of task clearance.
escalation_rules.claude_md_changed: If CLAUDE.md is modified, require manual review.
escalation_rules.identity_changed: If config/identity.py is modified, STOP and notify operator. This is her identity.
